title: lutroo #3084
definition:
1) to release on receipt of ransom
 2) to redeem, liberate by payment of ransom
    2a) to liberate
    2b) to cause to be released to one's self by payment of a ransom
    2c) to redeem
    2d) to deliver: from evils of every kind, internal and external
nasbUsage:

 2) to redeem, liberate by payment of ransom
    2a) to liberate
    2b) to cause to be released to one's self by payment of a ransom
